title: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks fell in response
summary: The report said that CEO Mark Zuckerberg directed staff to develop a prediction markets platform, internally known as "Arena."

title: GM reveals 2027 GMC Sierra pickup with new V-8 engines, redesigned styling
summary: The new GMC Sierra trucks are crucial to GM's sales and earnings, especially highly profitable luxury Denali and off-road AT4 models.
